title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal Consulting Pvt Ltd!
